Localization.Description: Persistence on a host was gained using systemd timer files. Attackers can use a timer to execute malicious code at system startup or based on a schedule to gain persistence and escalate privileges.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} gained persistence on host {event_src.host} using systemd timer files
User {subject.account.name} attempted to gain persistence on host {event_src.host} using a temporary systemd timer
User {subject.account.name} gained persistence on host {event_src.host} using systemd timer file "{object.name}"
